chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. S – 726 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of post-arrest bail 1. For orders on office objection at Flag-A 2. For hearing of post-arrest bail 18.09.2025 Mr. Ghulam Sarwar Halepoto, Advocate for applicant. Syed Sardar Ali Shah Rizvi, Additional Prosecutor General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Complainant is present and relies upon learned Additional Prosecutor General to proceed with the case. Learned Counsel for the applicant, after arguing the matter at some length, requires that appropriate directions may be issued to the learned trial Court for expeditious proceedings. Learned Additional Prosecutor General does not oppose the request so made. Accordingly, this bail application stands disposed of with direction to the learned trial Court to proceed with the case and conclude the same within a period of two months hereof. J U D G E Abdul Basit
